concept: Constellation of Memories. The family tree is rendered as floating glass nodes in a cinematic, dark void. Connections are glowing, elegant curved lines. The UI floats over the canvas as milled crystal (Glassmorphism).

headings.usage: Use font-light or font-normal. tracking-tight for H1/H2.

visual_enhancers.texture: Add a full-screen pointer-events-none fixed div over the whole app with the cinematic grain texture (mix-blend-overlay, opacity-30) to kill the digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.lighting: In R3F, use ambient light (intensity 0.5) and a directional light to give volume to any 3D elements.

grids_and_layouts.app_structure: Canvas takes 100vw, 100vh. UI elements are absolute positioned over the canvas with z-10.
grids_and_layouts.ui_panels: Right-side sliding panel (w-full md:w-96) for Member Details. Bottom floating toolbar for global actions. Top-left logo/title.
grids_and_layouts.bento_empty_state: Center floating glass card. Mode A: Grid-cols-1, p-12, flex-col, items-center. Generous spacing (gap-8).

3d_scene_guidelines.controls: OrbitControls (enableDamping=true, make dampingFactor low for premium feel).
3d_scene_guidelines.nodes: Use Drei's Html components for nodes to ensure text/photos always face the camera. Nodes should be circular, with a subtle white/10 border. DO NOT use 3D geometry for text.
3d_scene_guidelines.connections: Use Drei's QuadraticBezierLine or Line for connections. Curved lines feel more organic than straight lines.
3d_scene_guidelines.environment: Use Drei's Sparkles (count 200, scale 20, size 2, speed 0.2) to simulate dust/stars in the background.

components.buttons: Flat solid surfaces or glass. Primary CTA: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-[#E5C07B]. Secondary: glassmorphic.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI inputs but overridden: bg-white/5 border-white/10 text-white focus:border-[#D4AF37].
components.modals: Use Shadcn Dialog/Sheet, but remove the default white background. Apply the glassmorphism rules.

motion.ui_transitions: Framer Motion for UI panels (initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}).
motion.hover_states: Buttons lift slightly (-translate-y-0.5) and increase border opacity.

accessibility.contrast: Text must be readable over the dark glass. Ensure #A0A5B5 on black meets APCA standards.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='add-member-button', data-testid='member-node').

texture_grain.description: Full screen cinematic grain overlay (opacity 10-20%, mix-blend-overlay)

placeholder_female.description: Elegant monochrome female portrait for mock data

placeholder_male.description: Elegant monochrome male portrait for mock data

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react three @react-three/fiber @react-three/drei framer-motion date-fns
Note: Files must be .jsx or .js (no .tsx). Ensure you use standard JS module exports.
Configure tailwind.config.js to include font families: 'cormorant': ['Cormorant Garamond', 'serif'], 'manrope': ['Manrope', 'sans-serif'].
Do NOT use HTML inputs for Date or Selects. If building a form for adding a member, use custom styled components or pure Tailwind styling that matches the glassmorphic theme.
The 3D Scene must have a transparent or very dark background (#0A0B10) with Drei Sparkles for a magical dust effect.
Implement the family tree layout logic using a basic hierarchy tree algorithm to compute 3D positions (x, y, z) so nodes don't overlap. Root member at center, children below/outward, parents above.

Use R3F's <Html> component inside the 3D scene to render the node avatars as DOM elements, making it easier to handle clicks, hover states, and displaying the uploaded photos. Apply border-radius 50% to make them circular.
The UI layer must be absolute positioned over the <Canvas> component. Do NOT put the UI inside the 3D canvas.
Apply the film grain texture image as a fixed fullscreen overlay with pointer-events-none and low opacity to give it a Godly/Awwwards cinematic feel.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
